creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
[ath] Modern ath9k-based wifi cars (such as AR9285) have missed LED indication, however linux with ath9k driver always uses 'wifi' led indicator on laptops.

Traditional settings of sysctls (see below) doesn't work, in any combination of pin settings

How-To-Repeat: 

tunables from /etc/sysctl.conf:
#Wireless LED
dev.ath.0.ledpin=3
dev.ath.0.softled=1                                                                                                               
dev.ath.0.ledon=1
